name: clinicaltrialsgov-mcp-server
description: Search ClinicalTrials.gov trials, retrieve study details and results, and match patients to eligible trials via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

CT_API_BASE_URL.title: ClinicalTrials.gov API base URL
CT_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API.

CT_MAX_PAGE_SIZE.title: Maximum page size
CT_MAX_PAGE_SIZE.description: Maximum page size cap for API responses.

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn, error).

CT_MIRROR_ENABLED.title: Enable local study mirror
CT_MIRROR_ENABLED.description: Set to true to activate a self-refreshing SQLite+FTS5 local mirror of the study corpus.

CT_MIRROR_PATH.title: Mirror database path
CT_MIRROR_PATH.description: Filesystem path for the mirror SQLite database.

CT_MIRROR_REFRESH_CRON.title: Mirror refresh cron
CT_MIRROR_REFRESH_CRON.description: Cron expression for incremental mirror refresh (default: 3 AM daily).

CT_MIRROR_FALLBACK_LIVE.title: Fallback to live API
CT_MIRROR_FALLBACK_LIVE.description: Fall back to the live API when the mirror is not yet bootstrapped.
